parameters.query:
SELECT
  ap.config AS ai_config,
  t.nom AS tenant_name,
  t.email AS tenant_email,
  t.telephone AS tenant_phone,
  t.adresse AS tenant_address,
  t.siret,
  (
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('subject', eil.subject, 'from', eil.from_address, 'body_preview', eil.body_preview, 'reply_sent', eil.reply_body IS NOT NULL, 'created_at', eil.created_at))
    FROM (
      SELECT subject, from_address, body_preview, reply_body, created_at
      FROM email_incoming_logs
      WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid
        AND from_address = '{{ $json.from }}'
      ORDER BY created_at DESC
      LIMIT 5
    ) eil
  ) AS email_history
FROM automation_purchases ap
JOIN automation_catalog cat ON cat.id = ap.automation_id
JOIN tenants t ON t.id = ap.tenant_id
WHERE ap.tenant_id = '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid
  AND cat.code = 'email-ai-agent'
  AND ap.status = 'active'
LIMIT 1

UPDATE email_incoming_logs SET
  reply_subject = '{{ $json.reply.subject.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  reply_body = '{{ $json.reply.body_text.replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/\n/g, ' ') }}',
  reply_html = '{{ $json.reply.body_html.replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/\n/g, ' ') }}',
  reply_confidence = {{ $json.reply.confidence || 0 }},
  reply_action = '{{ $json.action }}',
  reply_generated_at = NOW(),
  tokens_used = COALESCE(tokens_used, 0) + {{ $json.tokensUsed || 0 }},
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.incomingLogId }}'::uuid
RETURNING id, reply_action
